name: PDF Viewer
description: View PDF files directly in Auracle
author: Auracle Team

marketplace.tagline: View PDF documents directly in the editor
marketplace.longDescription: Open and read PDF files without leaving Auracle. Renders PDF pages with full fidelity, supporting multi-page documents, zoom, and page navigation.
highlights: View PDF files inline without switching apps
Keeps your workspace context while reading documents

screenshots.alt: PDF document viewer showing a multi-page document with page navigation
